title: Design Add and Search Words Data Structure
input_format: A series of calls to `addWord` and `search`.
output_format: Boolean values for `search` indicating if the word is in the data structure.
constraints:
- `1 <= word.length <= 25`
- `word` in `addWord` consists of lowercase English letters.
- `word` in `search` consist of `.` or lowercase English letters.
- There will be at most `2` dots in `word` for `search` queries.
- At most `10^4` calls will be made to `addWord` and `search`.
function_signature: class WordDictionary { constructor() {} addWord(word: string): void {} search(word: string): boolean {} }
